title: Flow Control
description: Show, For, Switch, and ErrorBoundary control which components run based on reactive conditions.
show_intro: <0>Show</0> renders its children only when the <1>when</1> condition is truthy. It can also provide a fallback.
show_callback_intro: You can access the truthy value with a callback child:
for_intro: <0>For</0> iterates over a reactive list. Each item is keyed by reference. When the list changes, only affected items update.
error_boundary_intro: <0>ErrorBoundary</0> catches errors thrown in child components:
info_accessor_conditions: Flow components take accessor functions (<0>() => value</0>) for conditions. The condition re-evaluates without re-running the parent component.
